title: harpalyce formosa var. goldmanii
intro: Harpalyce formosa var. goldmanii, also known as the goldman's harpalyce, is a variety of the Harpalyce formosa plant, a type of legume native to Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, derived from its leaves, stems, and roots. The health benefits of Harpalyce formosa var. goldmanii include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
